report.summary: Community growth cycle v28: Tax Season urgency campaign (14 days to Apr 15) + Bloomberg Screener V3 Live Data product launch social (Sprint 58 lead deliverable); Restaking/AVS + Intent-Based DEX Trading threads for Apr 5-6 (publish queue pages); weekly newsletter draft for Apr 3; 2 engagement posts for Fri Apr 4; calendar filled Tue-Sun Apr 1-6; 2 new social cards created (tax-season, bloomberg-screener-live updated).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (Tue Apr 1 AM, 5 posts): Tax Season Urgency — 'Crypto taxes are due in 14 days and most people haven't started'; taxable events checklist, software recs, common audit mistakes; CTA to /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026 + /tools/tax-calculator
Tweet (Tue Apr 1 AM): Tax Season single — 14-day countdown, 3 action items, CTAs to guide + calculator

Twitter thread (Wed Apr 2 AM, 4 posts): Bloomberg Screener V3 Live Data — 'degen0x just shipped live DeFi data'; real-time TVL/APY/volume from DefiLlama, free + no signup; CTA to /tools/bloomberg-screener
Tweet (Wed Apr 2 AM): Bloomberg Screener single — live data announcement, 60-second refresh

Newsletter (Thu Apr 3): Weekly edition — Market Pulse, Bloomberg Screener V3 launch, Restaking + Intent-Based DEX guides, Tax countdown (12 days), Pectra countdown (7 days), Degen Corner on intent-based trading
Tweet (Fri Apr 4 AM): Community poll — 'What DeFi metric matters most when evaluating a protocol?' (TVL/Real Yield/Active Users/Audit Status)
Tweet (Fri Apr 4 PM): Engagement — 'Name one undervalued protocol and why' — best answers featured in next newsletter

Twitter thread (Sat Apr 5 AM, 5 posts): Restaking/AVS Ecosystem — 'EigenLayer restaking crossed $15B+ TVL'; what restaking is, AVS explained, ecosystem map, risks; CTA to /learn/restaking-avs-ecosystem-guide-2026 + /tools/staking-apy

Twitter thread (Sun Apr 6 AM, 5 posts): Intent-Based DEX Trading — 'Every time you swap on a DEX, MEV bots are probably taking money from you'; intent model, CoW Protocol/UniswapX/1inch Fusion, why it's better; CTA to /learn/intent-based-dex-trading-guide

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-tax-season-2026.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark theme with amber/red urgency gradient; '14 DAYS TO DEADLINE' countdown badge (red); left glass card with tax checklist (4 items, green/amber/red status); right glass card with taxable event pills (Sold for Profit, Token Swaps, Staking Rewards, Airdrops, Paid in Crypto, Mining Income); green savings tip callout on tax-loss harvesting; degen0x brand bar. Saved to /public/social-tax-season-2026.svg

social-bloomberg-screener-live.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark theme with indigo/cyan orbs; animated LIVE DATA badge (pulsing green dot); protocol table mockup showing Aave V3, Lido, EigenLayer, Uniswap V3 with TVL/APY/24h change columns; right glass card with 4 feature highlights (Live TVL, Yield Comparison, 60-second refresh, Free/no signup); degen0x brand bar. Updated at /public/social-bloomberg-screener-live.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Tax Season (Apr 1): 14 days to Apr 15 deadline. 'Crypto taxes' search intent peaks late March through mid-April. Tax guide + tax calculator are degen0x's highest-converting seasonal content pair. Thread format educates while driving tool usage. First dedicated tax campaign (previous cycles focused on tools/DeFi).

Bloomberg Screener V3 Live Data (Apr 2): Sprint 58's lead deliverable. Mock → real data is the single biggest credibility upgrade since launch. Product announcement format (not educational) because this is a feature ship. Positions degen0x as a serious data platform, not just a content site.

Restaking/AVS (Apr 5): Publish queue page — will be promoted before Apr 5 posting date. EigenLayer restaking at $15B+ TVL is the biggest new DeFi primitive. Educational thread drives traffic to guide + staking APY tool. Weekend educational content gets highest save/bookmark rate.

Intent-Based DEX Trading (Apr 6): Publish queue page — will be promoted before Apr 6 posting date. MEV protection resonates strongly with active DeFi users (pain point content). CoW Protocol, UniswapX, 1inch Fusion are recognizable names that drive engagement.

Newsletter (Apr 3): Consolidates week's launches (live data, tax urgency, Pectra T-7 countdown). Pectra Apr 10 = 7 days away at newsletter time — maximum urgency window. Three countdown angles in one edition (tax, Pectra, Bloomberg launch) creates urgency density.

Community engagement (Apr 4): Poll + open discussion format builds algorithmic reach (replies > likes for Twitter algo). 'Best answers in newsletter' incentivizes thoughtful replies. DeFi metrics poll feeds product decisions on screener improvements.
353 pages live, 2-3 in queue (restaking-avs-ecosystem, intent-based-dex-trading, smart-wallets). Calendar now filled Tue-Sun Apr 1-6. No posting conflicts with v27 (ends Mon Mar 31).
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-16-social-drafts-v28.md
Tax season social card saved to /public/social-tax-season-2026.svg
Bloomberg screener social card updated at /public/social-bloomberg-screener-live.svg
